verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You are welcome More than welcome Holy Spirit come and fills this place

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You are welcome More than welcome To abide in this temple To reside in this place

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We are gathering together To worship at your throne To exalt the Name of Jesus To worship Him alone

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He is worthy of our praises So we lift our voices high Spirit come, fill this place
